tools.name: get_brands
tools.description: Search authorized brands and manufacturers on authorized.by. Returns brand names, slugs, logos and authorized-retailer counts. Omit 'search' to retrieve the full index.

tools.name: get_brand
tools.description: Get the full profile for a specific brand: categories, website, headquarters country and description.

tools.name: get_brand_retailers
tools.description: Get all retailers authorized by a brand, sorted by subscription plan (PREMIUM → START → FREE) then by brand-connection count descending.

tools.name: get_retailers
tools.description: Search authorized retailers (shops) on authorized.by. Returns retailer names, slugs, shop URLs, logos and authorized-brand counts. Omit 'search' to retrieve the full index.

tools.name: get_retailer
tools.description: Get the full profile for a specific retailer: address, contact details, opening hours, categories, subscription plan, TÜV certification and customer rating.

tools.name: get_retailer_brands
tools.description: Get all brands a retailer is authorized to sell, sorted by brand name. Each entry includes the partnership_date (when the retailer became authorized for that brand).

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "get_brand_retailers" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Get all retailers authorized by a brand, sorted by subscription plan (PREMIUM → START → FREE) then by brand-connection count descending." → after: "Get all retailers authorized by a brand, sorted by subscription plan (PREMIUM → START → FREE) then by brand-connection count descending. Each retailer includes seal_implemented (whether the authorized.by seal is live on their shop)."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "get_retailers" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Search authorized retailers (shops) on authorized.by. Returns retailer names, slugs, shop URLs, logos and authorized-brand counts. Omit 'search' to retrieve the full index." → after: "Search authorized retailers (shops) on authorized.by. Returns retailer names, slugs, shop URLs, logos, authorized-brand counts and seal_implemented (whether the authorized.by seal is live on their shop). Omit 'search' to retrieve the full index."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "get_retailer" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Get the full profile for a specific retailer: address, contact details, opening hours, categories, subscription plan, TÜV certification and customer rating." → after: "Get the full profile for a specific retailer: address, contact details, opening hours, categories, subscription plan, TÜV certification, customer rating and seal_implemented (whether the authorized.by seal is live on their shop)."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
